{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603212236438A92F447BF8E79071EBA\"}"},"total":448},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7384733533921936152","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是一本引人入胜的冒险故事，充满了神奇和神秘的色彩。它不仅让人在阅读过程中感受到无尽的乐趣和惊喜，也让人对中国的古老文化有了更深入的了解和思考。我强烈推荐这本书给所有喜欢冒险、喜欢传统文化、喜欢文学的读者们。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1719495199,"group_id":"7383905541468212249","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6ufGX4rHX0JF6QTJ8WeB5k=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"110798066783","user_name":"上清的魏明元帝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110798066783","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7383905541468212249","book_info":{"abstract":"枕天剑劈向四神兽，顿时裂为七段......四玄女从地维之绳坠落轩辕丘险些丧命，却又要经受五行之刑......天盘崩裂，二十八星宿纷纷坠落，天盘碎成三十三块......《万神图》开启，化作三十三卷轴......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o599ec423da106ac0ab4bccc20203849d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"楸木小虫","author_id":"","book_id":"7383905541468212249","book_name":"山海溯源","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203858","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":1140,\"name\":\"东方仙侠\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140\u0026name=东方仙侠\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":7,\"name\":\"玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7\u0026name=玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":259,\"name\":\"奇幻仙侠\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259\u0026name=奇幻仙侠\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":9,\"name\":\"仙侠\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9\u0026name=仙侠\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":511,\"name\":\"东方玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511\u0026name=东方玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":452,\"name\":\"架空\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452\u0026name=架空\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":875,\"name\":\"山海经\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=875\u0026name=山海经\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7383905836151603737","read_count":"730","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"703805"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"333","tags":"东方仙侠,奇幻仙侠,仙侠,玄幻,东方玄幻,架空,山海经","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/97bc9c7e159402f7e3d5a6083db75730~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779287803\u0026x-signature=SfuVT8R7MikaFdcCzbUHgvz%2FK2s%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2272022962112339","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"19189"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603212236438A92F447BF8E79071EBA\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读34分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":16,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1998,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2017,"reply_count":8,"show_pv":2313},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1720397013,"author_reply_time":1723119041,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7412920168803926809","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"该小说有丰富的文化因素，不同于一般网络小说，语言典雅不失幽默，人物形象鲜明，动作描写精彩，情节紧凑，引人入胜，如能拍成电视剧，一定是一场饕餮盛宴。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1725961617,"group_id":"7383905541468212249","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+nX58OPYqZq9LMgcgV9zQ8=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"87447984074","user_name":"用户名90475839"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"87447984074","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7383905541468212249","book_info":{"abstract":"枕天剑劈向四神兽，顿时裂为七段......四玄女从地维之绳坠落轩辕丘险些丧命，却又要经受五行之刑......天盘崩裂，二十八星宿纷纷坠落，天盘碎成三十三块......《万神图》开启，化作三十三卷轴......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o599ec423da106ac0ab4bccc20203849d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"楸木小虫","author_id":"","book_id":"7383905541468212249","book_name":"山海溯源","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203858","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":1140,\"name\":\"东方仙侠\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140\u0026name=东方仙侠\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":7,\"name\":\"玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7\u0026name=玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":259,\"name\":\"奇幻仙侠\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259\u0026name=奇幻仙侠\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":9,\"name\":\"仙侠\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9\u0026name=仙侠\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":511,\"name\":\"东方玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511\u0026name=东方玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":452,\"name\":\"架空\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452\u0026name=架空\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":875,\"name\":\"山海经\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=875\u0026name=山海经\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7383905836151603737","read_count":"730","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"703805"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"333","tags":"东方仙侠,奇幻仙侠,仙侠,玄幻,东方玄幻,架空,山海经","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/97bc9c7e159402f7e3d5a6083db75730~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779287803\u0026x-signature=SfuVT8R7MikaFdcCzbUHgvz%2FK2s%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2272022962112339","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"189"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603212236438A92F447BF8E79071EBA\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1765,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10688,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1623},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1726198129,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7435241741696959294","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是我看过的最精彩最有价值的一本网络小说。它文质兼美，内容包含传统文化因素，读来开拓视野，丰富知识。语言典雅，又不失幽默风趣。人物动作和语言描写十分精彩，尤其武打动作，颇有传统评书之趣，继承传统章回小说的衣钵，又融入现代因素，在传承中创新，引领小说创作新时尚，为当代小说创作打开新局面。最值得一提的是，作品价值观正，语言和情节健康，不仅适合成年人阅读，也适合青少年阅读，堪称教科书级读物。作品构思精巧，围绕主线展开，同时设置多条暗线，多处铺垫伏笔，充分运用草灰蛇线结构，情节丰富，跌宕起伏。这是不可多得的优秀小说，文学价值和文化价值非常高。精彩的武打片段描写如果拍成影视剧，将是一场视觉的饕餮盛宴，期待着。","text_exts":[{"e":286,"s":283,"text":"影视剧","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E5%BD%B1%E8%A7%86%E5%89%A7\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177410380379071EBA%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227435241741696959294%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227383905541468212249%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%BD%B1%E8%A7%86%E5%89%A7%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731154439,"group_id":"7383905541468212249","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6HbjIU2ul5eHCRu+Tyq88E=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"111644392105","user_name":"用户11164439"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111644392105","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7383905541468212249","book_info":{"abstract":"枕天剑劈向四神兽，顿时裂为七段......四玄女从地维之绳坠落轩辕丘险些丧命，却又要经受五行之刑......天盘崩裂，二十八星宿纷纷坠落，天盘碎成三十三块......《万神图》开启，化作三十三卷轴......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o599ec423da106ac0ab4bccc20203849d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"楸木小虫","author_id":"","book_id":"7383905541468212249","book_name":"山海溯源","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203858","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_sche
